name: Colette's Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease the sides and bottom of two 9-inch cake pans with shortening, then dust them with flour.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the coffee. Mix at low speed until blended, scraping the sides of the bowl occasionally with a rubber spatula.
4. Slowly add the coffee while continuing to mix on low speed. Mix until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into prepared pans and bake for about 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow cakes to cool in the pans on wire racks for about 20 minutes, then invert onto racks and remove from pans. Cool completely.
Yield: 2, 9-inch layers, 2 inches high
